name: Chunky Leek and Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cube the potatoes. Place in a large bowl with the cold water. Leave to one side.
2. Top and tail the leeks, then slice into chunks. Wash in a bowl of cold water, drain and rinse. Leave to drain in a colander.
3. Finely chop the onion.
4. Saute the garlic and onions in a large deep saucepan in the oil until tender.
5. Add the potatoes and the water they have been sitting in.
6. Increase the heat, bringing the liquid to a rolling boil.
7. Add the yeast extract. Stir well, reduce heat and add the leeks, black pepper, bay leaves, and caraway seed. Stir for 1-2 minutes.
8. Add the celery to the soup and simmer for a further 15 minutes.
9. Serve hot.
